prompt_cases.label: Technical explanation
prompt_cases.text: Write a concise technical explanation of speculative decoding for local LLM inference. Include why it can improve tokens per second, how acceptance affects speed, and one caveat.

prompt_cases.label: Code generation
prompt_cases.text: Write a Python implementation of merge sort with type hints. Then explain its time complexity, space complexity, and one practical optimization for nearly sorted input.

prompt_cases.label: Math reasoning
prompt_cases.text: Solve this carefully: A data pipeline processes 18,000 records per minute. A speculative decoder reduces generation latency by 35%, but adds 8% verification overhead. If the original end-to-end job takes 42 minutes and generation is 60% of runtime, estimate the new runtime and show the calculation.

prompt_cases.label: Korean explanation
prompt_cases.text: 한국어로 설명해 주세요. 온디바이스 LLM에서 speculative decoding과 MTP drafter가 어떻게 토큰 생성 속도를 높이는지, 그리고 acceptance가 낮을 때 왜 오히려 느려질 수 있는지 예시와 함께 정리하세요.
